title: arivela microphylla
intro: Arivela microphylla, also known as Mexican Prickly Poppy or Mexican Poppy, is a flowering plant in the poppy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Arivela microphylla include reducing pain and inflammation, treating fever and skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
